variants.name: 德拉科·马尔福
variants.ability: 一名善良玩家和一名邪恶玩家（如果卢修斯在场，必是卢修斯）知道你在场。每个夜晚，如果他们存活，他们会分别被唤醒并猜测你是德拉科，即使你已转变阵营。你转变为首个猜对你的玩家的阵营。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the Good Recruiter (If Alive) and show them the Draco Malfoy character token, ask them to choose a player. Wake the Evil Recruiter (If Alive) and show them the Draco Malfoy character token, ask them to choose a player, even if Draco has been successfully guessed.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Good Recruiter (If Alive) and show them the Draco Malfoy character token, ask them to choose a player. Wake the Evil Recruiter (If Alive) and show them the Draco Malfoy character token, ask them to choose a player, even if Draco has been successfully guessed.
variants.flavor: Didn't mummy ever tell you it was rude to eavesdrop, Potter?
